title: Chesapeake Bay Sediment Plumes from Landsat 9
explanation: Spring runoff carries brown sediment plumes down the Susquehanna into the upper Chesapeake Bay in this natural-color Landsat 9 scene.

title: Wildfire Smoke over the Mid-Atlantic from Terra MODIS
explanation: A thick pall of Canadian wildfire smoke drifts south across the Mid-Atlantic states in this Terra MODIS true-color image.

title: Mississippi River Delta Land Loss from Landsat
explanation: Four decades of Landsat imagery document the retreat of coastal wetlands across the Mississippi River delta.

title: Arctic Sea Ice Minimum from AMSR2
explanation: Satellite passive-microwave data map the shrinking extent of Arctic sea ice against the 1981-2010 median edge.

title: The Blue Marble Earth from DSCOVR EPIC
explanation: The sunlit face of Earth hangs against black space in this full-disk portrait from the EPIC camera at the L1 Lagrange point.

title: Global Temperature Anomalies for 2025
explanation: A color-coded GISTEMP map shows how 2025 surface temperatures departed from the 20th-century average across the globe.

title: Earth at Night The Black Marble
explanation: Suomi NPP night-lights data reveal the glowing web of human settlement across the darkened continents.

title: Greenland Ice Sheet Melt Ponds from Operation IceBridge
explanation: Aerial and satellite views capture summer meltwater ponds pooling across the surface of the Greenland ice sheet.

title: Hurricane over the Gulf Coast from GOES-East
explanation: A major hurricane spins toward the Gulf Coast in this GOES-East geostationary image taken near landfall.

title: Amazon Deforestation Seen from Landsat
explanation: The fishbone pattern of cleared forest spreads along new roads in the Brazilian Amazon in this Landsat land-cover scene.

title: California Wildfire Burn Scars from Sentinel and Landsat
explanation: Charcoal-dark burn scars mark the footprint of a summer wildfire complex across the Sierra Nevada foothills.

title: Pakistan Monsoon Flooding from MODIS
explanation: Swollen rivers spill across the Indus floodplain after record monsoon rains in this MODIS flood-mapping composite.

title: Lake Mead Shrinking Shoreline from Landsat
explanation: The pale bathtub ring of Lake Mead widens as a multiyear drought lowers the reservoir behind Hoover Dam.

title: Delmarva Peninsula and Chesapeake Bay from the ISS
explanation: An astronaut aboard the International Space Station photographs the Delmarva Peninsula, Chesapeake Bay, and the mouth of the Potomac.

title: Global Vegetation Greenness from MODIS NDVI
explanation: A year-averaged MODIS vegetation-index map paints the living land surface in shades of green for Earth Day.

title: Antarctic Ozone Hole from Aura OMI
explanation: The Aura satellite's ozone-monitoring instrument maps the seasonal thinning of stratospheric ozone over Antarctica.

title: Sea Surface Temperature Patterns from PACE
explanation: NASA's PACE mission charts warm and cool ocean currents shaping regional climate across the tropical Pacific.

title: Rising Carbon Dioxide from OCO-2
explanation: The Orbiting Carbon Observatory-2 maps atmospheric carbon dioxide concentrations in swirling bands around the planet.

title: Louisiana Coastal Wetland Loss from Landsat
explanation: Time-lapse Landsat imagery shows open water advancing into the bayous of coastal Louisiana over four decades.

title: Aral Sea Disappearance from MODIS
explanation: Two decades of MODIS imagery record the near-total drying of the Aral Sea after river diversion for irrigation.

title: Hurricane Milton over Florida from GOES-16
explanation: A well-defined eye marks Hurricane Milton as it approaches Florida's Gulf coast in this GOES-16 satellite view.

title: Greenland Glacier Retreat from ASTER
explanation: The Terra ASTER instrument tracks the calving front of a Greenland outlet glacier retreating up its fjord.

title: Western Wildfires and Smoke from Suomi NPP
explanation: The VIIRS instrument on Suomi NPP flags active fire fronts and drifting smoke across the western United States.

title: Appalachian Ridge and Valley from the ISS
explanation: An astronaut photograph reveals the folded ridges and forested valleys of the central Appalachians from orbit.

title: Global Sea Level Rise from Sentinel-6
explanation: Radar altimetry from the Sentinel-6 Michael Freilich mission maps the steady rise of global mean sea level.

title: Great Lakes Winter Ice Cover from MODIS
explanation: A late-winter MODIS mosaic captures the extent of seasonal ice across Lakes Superior, Michigan, and Erie.

title: The Blue Marble Africa and Arabia
explanation: A composite Blue Marble portrait centered on Africa and the Arabian Peninsula marks Earth Day.

title: Colorado River Basin Drought from Landsat
explanation: Shrinking reservoirs and stressed cropland trace the long-term drought gripping the Colorado River basin.

title: Antarctic Iceberg A-76 from MODIS
explanation: The world's largest iceberg drifts through the Weddell Sea after breaking from the Ronne Ice Shelf.

title: Nile River Delta at Night from the ISS
explanation: City lights outline the fertile fan of the Nile Delta against the dark Egyptian desert in this astronaut photograph.

title: Global Wildfire Activity for 2023 from VIIRS
explanation: A full-year VIIRS fire-detection map plots the seasonal march of wildfires across every inhabited continent.

title: Mount Kilimanjaro Retreating Glaciers from ASTER
explanation: Repeat ASTER imagery documents the dwindling summit ice fields of Mount Kilimanjaro over two decades.

title: Phytoplankton Bloom in the North Atlantic from MODIS
explanation: Swirls of blue-green phytoplankton paint the springtime North Atlantic in this MODIS ocean-color image.

title: Libya Flooding after Storm Daniel from Landsat
explanation: Before-and-after Landsat scenes reveal the catastrophic flooding that struck the Libyan city of Derna.

title: Canadian Wildfire Smoke over North America from GOES
explanation: Record Canadian wildfires send smoke streaming across the eastern United States in this GOES-East loop still.

title: Record Ocean Heat in the North Atlantic from PACE
explanation: Sea-surface temperature analysis highlights an unprecedented marine heat wave gripping the North Atlantic.

title: Snowpack in the Sierra Nevada from Landsat
explanation: A deep winter snowpack blankets the Sierra Nevada in this Landsat scene, easing California's long drought.

title: Everglades Wetlands and Land Use from Landsat
explanation: Landsat imagery contrasts the sawgrass wetlands of the Everglades with the surrounding agricultural and urban land.
